name: HbA1c Testing Codes
description: CPT and LOINC codes for hemoglobin A1c (glycated hemoglobin) laboratory testing. Used in diabetes care measures to determine if A1c testing was performed and to evaluate A1c control thresholds.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Hemoglobin; glycosylated (A1c) by device cleared by FDA for home use
Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by HPLC
Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by calculation
Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by IFCC protocol
Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by JDS/JSCC protocol
Hemoglobin A1c/Hemoglobin.total in Blood by calculation (IFCC)
Most recent hemoglobin A1c level less than 7.0%
Most recent hemoglobin A1c level greater than 9.0%
